data.body: Add tests asserting delivery-target correctness: (a) no-PR profiles (autopilot, semiauto, *_no_planning) do not emit PR review artifacts in their rendered prompts, (b) PR profiles (autopilot_with_pr, *_no_planning) require/mention PR artifacts in their rendered prompts, (c) each profile's review/shipment target is correctly represented as branch/PR/main/live, (d) human-gated profiles preserve gate points unchanged. Test locations: src/skills.rs tests module, src/profile_tests.rs, and/or src/installed_workflows/ test modules.
data.title: Add tests for profile-specific prompt delivery targets
